redGuard.focusedCommand: source ~/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use 20 >/dev/null && pnpm vitest run src/renderer/packages/chatbridge/runtime/execution-governor.test.ts test/integration/chatbridge/scenarios/execution-governor-entrypoint.test.ts
failureSummary: The new unit seam had no implementation yet, so execution-governor.test.ts failed immediately because ./execution-governor did not exist.

The first scenario pass also exposed an important runtime contract detail: natural Chess fallback can still carry a clarify route decision while selecting Chess for execution, so the governor contract had to preserve that distinction instead of flattening everything into invoke.
